case_title: KEGT VILDOR VS. BASIC GREEN CLEANING SERVICES,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILDOR, KEGT AS TO DEFENDANT BASIC GREEN CLEANING SERVICES, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP; COREY GRIFFIN AND JOHN GRIFFIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS PARTNERS OF BASIC GREEN CLEANING SERVICES, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILDOR, KEGT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BASIC GREEN CLEANING SERVICES, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP; COREY GRIFFIN AND JOHN GRIFFIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS PARTNERS OF BASIC GREEN CLEANING SERVICES, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $4,883.89 PRINCIPAL, $101.72 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,210.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
